---
title: "Can cell classification models be applied to whole slide tumour prediction?"
subtitle: "Image Group 7"
author: "Everyones SID's"
format:
  html:
    code-tools: true
    code-fold: true
    fig_caption: yes
    number_sections: yes
    embed-resources: true
    theme: 
      - flatly
      - custom.css
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 4
    toc_float: true
    highlight-style: monokai
execute:
  echo: true
  tidy: true
---

## 

```{python}
print("This is python code output")
```

> **Simple note**
>
> For little notes?

::: callout-note
## Callout Note

Noting this **calloutttt**
:::

::: {.callout-warning style="color: red"}
## Warning callout

Serious **callout**!
:::

# Executive summary

All text

# Introduction

TEXT

## Background

All text

# Results example

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(reticulate)
use_virtualenv("~/.virtualenvs/r-tensorflow", required = TRUE)
py_install("pandas")
```

# 

vgg16 class report - doesn't have output in file for classification report

and vgg16_train 24 may smth is train and test on uncentered i think??? check

check if both centered cnn 50 & 100 is correct files

old vgg19 class report + plots loss/accuracy

old inception class report + plots loss/accuracy

HOG-RBG (knn classifier) - path = models_code/HOGRGB_KNN_RF/Outputs and file names follow - classification_report_foldQ4_k10.txt, classification_report_foldQ3_k10.txt, classification_report_foldQ2_k16.txt and classification_report_foldQ1_k12.

Simple CNN50(centered) - path = models_code/CNN/Output_50_both_centered and file names - classification_report_fold\_{fold}.txt, between 1 to 4 folds

Simple CNN100(centered) - path = models_code/CNN/Output_100_both_centered and file names - classification_report_fold\_{fold}.txt, between 1 to 4 folds

Simple CNN50(uncentered) - path = models_code/CNN/Output_50_both_uncentered and file names - classification_report_fold\_{fold}.txt, between 1 to 4 folds

Simple CNN100(uncentered) - path = models_code/CNN/Output_100_both_uncentered and file names - classification_report_fold\_{fold}.txt, between 1 to 4 folds

Simple CNN50(centered/uncentered) - path = models_code/CNN/Output_50_train-centered_test-uncentered and file names - classification_report_fold\_{fold}.txt, between 1 to 4 folds

Simple CNN100(centered/uncentered) - path = models_code/CNN/Output_100_train-centered_test-uncentered and file names - classification_report_fold\_{fold}.txt, between 1 to 4 folds

InceptionV3 - path = models_code/InceptionV3/outputs and file names - classification_report_fold\_{fold}.txt, between 1 to 4 folds

ResNet50 - path = models_code/ResNet50/outputs and file names - classification_report_fold{fold}.txt, between 1 to 4 folds

VGG19 - path = models_code/VGG19/outputs and file names - classification_report_fold\_{fold}.txt, between 1 to 4 folds

```{python}
import re
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
from tabulate import tabulate

# Regex patterns
accuracy_pattern = re.compile(r'accuracy\s+([\d.]+)')
tumor_pattern = re.compile(r'^\s*Tumor\s+[\d.]+\s+[\d.]+\s+([\d.]+)', re.MULTILINE)

def mean_std_str(values):
    mean_val = np.mean(values)
    std_val = np.std(values, ddof=1) if len(values) > 1 else 0.0
    return f"{mean_val:.4f} (±{std_val:.4f})"

def extract_metrics(report_dir, file_names, model_name):
    accuracies = []
    tumor_f1_scores = []

    for file_name in file_names:
        file_path = Path(report_dir) / file_name
        if not file_path.exists():
            print(f"File not found: {file_path}")
            continue

        with open(file_path, 'r') as f:
            content = f.read()

        # Extract accuracy
        acc_match = accuracy_pattern.search(content)
        if acc_match:
            accuracies.append(float(acc_match.group(1)))
        else:
            print(f"Accuracy not found in file {file_name}")

        # Extract tumor f1-score
        tumor_match = tumor_pattern.search(content)
        if tumor_match:
            tumor_f1_scores.append(float(tumor_match.group(1)))
        else:
            print(f"Tumor F1 score not found in file {file_name}")

    acc_summary = mean_std_str(accuracies) if accuracies else "N/A"
    f1_summary = mean_std_str(tumor_f1_scores) if tumor_f1_scores else "N/A"

    return {
        'Model metrics': model_name,
        'Accuracy': acc_summary,
        'F1 Score (Tumor)': f1_summary
    }

# Define models and their paths
models_info = [
    {
        'model_name': 'HOG -RGB (rf classifier)',
        'path': 'models_code/HOGRGB_KNN_RF/Outputs',
        'files': [f"classification_report_rf_foldQ{q}.txt" for q in range(1, 5)]
    },
    {
        'model_name': 'HOG -RGB (knn classifier)',
        'path': 'models_code/HOGRGB_KNN_RF/Outputs',
        'files': [
            "classification_report_foldQ4_k10.txt",
            "classification_report_foldQ3_k10.txt",
            "classification_report_foldQ2_k16.txt",
            "classification_report_foldQ1_k12.txt"
        ]
    },
    {
        'model_name': 'Simple CNN50 (centered)',
        'path': 'models_code/SimpleCNN/Output_50_both_centered',
        'files': [f"classification_report_fold_{i}.txt" for i in range(1, 5)]
    },
    {
        'model_name': 'Simple CNN100 (centered)',
        'path': 'models_code/SimpleCNN/Output_100_both_centered',
        'files': [f"classification_report_fold_{i}.txt" for i in range(1, 5)]
    },
    {
        'model_name': 'Simple CNN50 (uncentered)',
        'path': 'models_code/SimpleCNN/Output_50_both_uncentered',
        'files': [f"classification_report_fold_{i}.txt" for i in range(1, 5)]
    },
    {
        'model_name': 'Simple CNN100 (uncentered)',
        'path': 'models_code/SimpleCNN/Output_100_both_uncentered',
        'files': [f"classification_report_fold_{i}.txt" for i in range(1, 5)]
    },
    {
        'model_name': 'Simple CNN50 (centered/uncentered)',
        'path': 'models_code/SimpleCNN/Output_50_train-centered_test-uncentered',
        'files': [f"classification_report_uncentered_fold_{i}.txt" for i in range(1, 5)]
    },
    {
        'model_name': 'Simple CNN100 (centered/uncentered)',
        'path': 'models_code/SimpleCNN/Output_100_train-centered_test-uncentered',
        'files': [f"classification_report_uncentered_fold_{i}.txt" for i in range(1, 5)]
    },
    {
        'model_name': 'InceptionV3',
        'path': 'models_code/InceptionV3/outputs',
        'files': [f"classification_report_fold_{i}.txt" for i in range(1, 5)]
    },
    {
        'model_name': 'ResNet50',
        'path': 'models_code/ResNet50/outputs',
        'files': [f"classification_report_fold{i}.txt" for i in range(1, 5)]
    },
    {
        'model_name': 'VGG19',
        'path': 'models_code/VGG19/outputs',
        'files': [f"classification_report_fold_{i}.txt" for i in range(1, 5)]
    }
]

# Compile all results
results = []
for model_info in models_info:
    result = extract_metrics(model_info['path'], model_info['files'], model_info['model_name'])
    results.append(result)

# Convert to DataFrame and print
summary_df = pd.DataFrame(results)
print(tabulate(summary_df, headers='keys', tablefmt='grid', showindex=False))

```
